STREAM_PACER.Title: Scene Pacing

Status.hand_raised: Hand Raised - I want to do/say something

STREAM_PACER.SoftSignalTooltip: Send a gentle nudge that you'd like to wrap up
STREAM_PACER.SoftSignalMessage: GM would like to wrap up
STREAM_PACER.CountdownTooltip: Start a countdown timer for scene ending
STREAM_PACER.FloorOpenTooltip: Open the floor for player actions - raise your hand
STREAM_PACER.FloorOpenMessage: Floor is open - raise your hand
STREAM_PACER.DirePerilTooltip: Declare Dire Peril — death is on the table
STREAM_PACER.DirePerilRunTop: HAZARD CLASS [LETHAL] // PROTOCOL ENGAGED // ENCOUNTER [CRITICAL] // DEATH IS ON THE TABLE //

Campfire.Tooltip: Light a Campfire Scene — invite the table to relax and roleplay
Campfire.Title: Campfire Scene
Campfire.Subtitle: Relax, roleplay, and explore your characters
Campfire.DialogHint: Signal the table to slow down and roleplay. Leave the timer at 0 for an open-ended scene.

Spotlight.Title: Spotlight
Spotlight.ToggleTooltip: Toggle this player in or out of the spotlight
Spotlight.UnderservedTooltip: Underserved — well below the table's average spotlight time
Spotlight.ResetConfirm: Clear every player's tracked spotlight time? This cannot be undone.

Settings.DefaultCountdownHint: Default duration in seconds for the countdown timer (1-10 minutes)
Settings.ResetOnSceneChangeHint: Automatically reset all player statuses when the scene changes
Settings.ExemptUsersHint: Choose what each user is hidden from. "General Bars" hides the Stream Pacer UI; "Dire Peril" hides the Dire Peril splash. These are independent — e.g. hide a streaming overlay from the bars but still let it show Dire Peril.
Settings.PerilExemptUsersHint: Select users who will not see the Dire Peril splash animation or indicator
Settings.HandRaiseAudioEnabledHint: Play a chime sound when a player raises their hand (GM only)
Settings.HandRaiseAudioVolumeHint: Volume level for the hand raise notification chime (0 = mute, 1 = full volume)
Settings.AppearanceHint: Customize the Dire Peril reveal text and effect settings for Stream Pacer
Settings.AppearanceIntro: Stream Pacer uses a single refined "Arcane Glass" look. Use the options below to customize the Dire Peril reveal and effects.
Settings.PerilWebGLHint: Render the cinematic WebGL danger field during the Dire Peril reveal. Disable on low-end machines.
Settings.PerilTextHint: Customize the Dire Peril reveal text (GM only — shared with all players). Leave a field blank to use the default.
